mat_screw.name: Steel Screws
mat_screw.description: Basic fasteners needed for almost everything.

mat_nail.name: Copper Nails
mat_nail.description: Resistant to saltwater rust, used for exterior parts.

mat_plank.name: Pine Planks
mat_plank.description: Lightweight wood for decking and details.

mat_tar.name: Pitch Tar
mat_tar.description: Sticky substance for waterproofing the hull.

mat_rope.name: Hemp Rope
mat_rope.description: Thick ropes for rigging and securing sails.

mat_log.name: Oak Logs
mat_log.description: Heavy, sturdy wood for the ship's core skeleton.

mat_canvas.name: Canvas Cloth
mat_canvas.description: Heavy duty fabric to catch the wind.

mat_iron.name: Iron Ingots
mat_iron.description: Solid metal blocks for heavy machinery and anchors.

mat_glass.name: Glass Lenses
mat_glass.description: Fragile but essential for navigation tools.

part_01_keel.name: The Keel
part_01_keel.description: The backbone of the ship. Must be built first.

part_02_hull.name: The Hull
part_02_hull.description: The watertight body of the ship.

part_03_deck.name: The Main Deck
part_03_deck.description: Where the crew stands and fights.

part_04_mast.name: The Mainmast
part_04_mast.description: The tall wooden pole that holds the sails.

part_05_rigging.name: The Rigging
part_05_rigging.description: The complex web of ropes holding the mast secure.

part_07_rudder.name: The Rudder
part_07_rudder.description: Steers the ship through treacherous waters.

part_08_anchor.name: Heavy Iron Anchor
part_08_anchor.description: Keeps the ship from drifting during Hurricane Season.

part_09_crows_nest.name: Crow's Nest
part_09_crows_nest.description: A lookout point high above the deck.

part_10_cannons.name: Broadside Cannons
part_10_cannons.description: Heavy artillery to defend against Pirate Raids.

part_11_wheel.name: Captain's Wheel
part_11_wheel.description: Connects to the rudder for precise steering.

part_12_compass.name: Golden Compass
part_12_compass.description: The final piece needed to navigate to the Leaders Island.
